steps.expected: User-friendly 404 UI is rendered for unknown SPA route
steps.observed: Page showed '404 Page not found' with user-facing guidance and navigation links
Both http://localhost:3100/api/nonexistent and http://localhost:3101/api/nonexistent returned HTTP 404 with {"error":"Not found"}

steps.expected: Success flash/toast appears immediately after successful login
Success flash uses green success styling
steps.observed: Computed styles were green-tinted (background rgb(236, 253, 243), border rgb(191, 252, 217), text rgb(0, 138, 46))

steps.action: Navigate to another admin page after flash is shown
steps.observed: After navigating to /admin/users, toast count was 0 and no flash remained

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/login -> 200 (foundation-auth/ui-404-flash/VAL-ADMIN-004-login-curl.txt); toast style capture (foundation-auth/ui-404-flash/VAL-ADMIN-004-flash-style.json); post-navigation toast absence (foundation-auth/ui-404-flash/VAL-ADMIN-004-after-navigation-toast-check.json)

frictions.description: agent-browser network request export did not provide useful request entries/statuses during this run.
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental curl response evidence for explicit HTTP status and JSON payload verification.

frictions.description: Success toast is short-lived and easy to miss for style checks.
frictions.resolution: Captured screenshot immediately after login and extracted computed styles via in-page evaluation.
